channel.title: GitHub AI Ranking Changes (Top 10)
channel.description: Track changes in GitHub AI repository rankings (Top 10 per category)

item.title: [OpenAI] markitdown
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 94,470 → 97,262 (+2,792)
Python tool for converting files and office documents to Markdown.
Language: Python
Category: OpenAI Stars: 97,262 | Forks: 5,919

item.title: [MoE] Bangumi
item.description:
📉 Rank: #7 → #8 (↓1)
:electron: An unofficial https://bgm.tv ui first app client for Android and iOS, built with React Native. 一个无广告、以爱好为驱动、不以盈利为目的、专门做 ACG 的类似豆瓣的追番记录，bgm.tv 第三方客户端。为移动端重新设计，内置大量加强的网页端难以实现的功能，且提供了相当的自定义选项。 目前已适配 iOS / Android。
Language: TypeScript
Category: MoE Stars: 5,364 | Forks: 157

item.title: [MoE] flashinfer
item.description:
📈 Rank: #8 → #7 (↑1)
FlashInfer: Kernel Library for LLM Serving
Language: Python
Category: MoE Stars: 5,364 | Forks: 880

item.title: [LLM] everything-claude-code
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 147,301 → 149,005 (+1,704)
The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.
Language: JavaScript
Category: LLM Stars: 149,005 | Forks: 23,047

item.title: [Claude] gstack
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 67,505 → 68,648 (+1,143)

Language: TypeScript
Category: Claude Stars: 68,648 | Forks: 9,562

item.title: [AI] AutoGPT
item.description:
📉 Rank: #2 → #3 (↓1)
AutoGPT is the vision of accessible AI for everyone, to use and to build on. Our mission is to provide the tools, so that you can focus on what matters.
Language: Python
Category: AI Stars: 183,284 | Forks: 46,225

item.title: [AI] openclaw

item.title: [AI] n8n
item.description:
📈 Rank: #3 → #2 (↑1)
Fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities. Combine visual building with custom code, self-host or cloud, 400+ integrations.
Language: TypeScript
Category: AI Stars: 183,338 | Forks: 56,634
